channel.title: IT Promotion on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in IT Promotion on simeononsecurity

item.title: Moving Up in Your IT Career
item.category: "IT career advancement" , "IT promotion" , "IT management track" , "technical track" , "IT certifications" , "IT compliance" , "ITIL" , "NIST" , "career growth in IT"
item.description: How to advance from individual contributor to senior engineer or IT management — certifications, the technical vs. management track, and the compliance frameworks every senior IT professional needs to know.
